name: Alto Neuroscience, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company with a mission to redefine psychiatry by leveraging neurobiology to develop personalized and highly effective treatment options. Our current pipeline consists of seven clinical-stage assets addressing high-need therapeutic areas, including MDD, BPD, TRD, schizophrenia, and Parkinson's disease.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company with a mission to redefine psychiatry by leveraging neurobiology to develop personalized and highly effective treatment options.

If we are unable to develop and obtain regulatory approval or clearance for the companion diagnostic tools needed to leverage our Platform, our business, financial condition, results of operations, and prospects could be materially and adversely affected.

Our approach to the discovery and development of precision medicines based on our Platform is unproven, and we do not know whether we will be able to develop any therapeutics or companion diagnostics of commercial value, or if competing technological approaches will limit the commercial value of our product candidates and Platform.

catalysts.event: Reported negative topline results from Phase 2b trial of ALTO-100 in MDD
catalysts.sentence: We reported negative topline results in October 2024 with regard to our Phase 2b trial of ALTO-100 in MDD.

catalysts.event: Reported interim analysis results from clinical trial of ALTO-300 in MDD
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we reported the results of an interim analysis of our clinical trial of ALTO-300 in MDD.
